title: Change Your Password
text: Change Your Password You can change your password only for certain network paths. These paths must be specified in the [XLOGIN] section of your assignment file. Ensure that the Log On form displays when opening the path. This is determined by the path assignment in your assignment file. To change your password: Click Change Password on the Log On form. This displays the Change Password form. Enter the following information in the Change Password form: Your current password in the Old Password field Your new password in the New Password field Your new password in the Retype Password field. This confirms that you have entered your password correctly Click OK . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
